zh.lifeSummary: 當Alix van Zotteghem於大約1199年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內時，她的父親Wouter van Zottegem III34歲，母親Alice de Mortagne32歲。她於1219年之前與Sohier d'Enghien, Seigneur d’Enghien結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1238年享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alix van Zotteghem于大约1199年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內时，她的父亲Wouter van Zottegem III34岁，母亲Alice de Mortagne32岁。她于1219年之前与Sohier d'Enghien, Seigneur d’Enghien结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1238年享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Alix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Alex  , used only as a feminine name. Its formation has probably been influenced by   Alice .

en.lifeSummary: When Alix van Zotteghem was born about 1199, in Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Wouter van Zottegem III, was 34 and her mother, Alice de Mortagne, was 32. She married Sohier d'Enghien, Seigneur d’Enghien before 1219. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1238, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alix van Zotteghem est née environ 1199, à Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Wouter van Zottegem III, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Alice de Mortagne, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Sohier d'Enghien, Seigneur d’Enghien avant 1219. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1238, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alix van Zotteghem um 1199 in Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Wouter van Zottegem III 34 und ihre Mutter Alice de Mortagne 32. Sie hat vor 1219 Sohier d'Enghien, Seigneur d’Enghien geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1238 im Alter von 40 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alix van Zotteghem è nata il circa 1199 nel Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Wouter van Zottegem III, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Alice de Mortagne, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Sohier d'Enghien, Seigneur d’Enghien prima del 1219. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1238, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alix van Zotteghemが約1199年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスブeスウンで生まれた時，父Wouter van Zottegem IIIは34歳，母Alice de Mortagneは32歳であった。1219年以前にSohier d'Enghien, Seigneur d’Enghienと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1238年に40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alix van Zotteghem(이)가 대략 1199년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 브e툰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Wouter van Zottegem III(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Mortagne(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1219년 이전 Sohier d'Enghien, Seigneur d’Enghien(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1238년 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alix van Zotteghem nasceu aproximadamente 1199, em Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Wouter van Zottegem III, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Mortagne, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Sohier d'Enghien, Seigneur d’Enghien antes 1219. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1238, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alix van Zotteghem родилась около 1199 г. в местности бeтун, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Wouter van Zottegem III было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Mortagne, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sohier d'Enghien, Seigneur d’Enghien перед 1219 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1238 г. в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alix van Zotteghem nació aproximadamente 1199, en Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Wouter van Zottegem III, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Alice de Mortagne, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Sohier d'Enghien, Seigneur d’Enghien antes de 1219. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1238, a la edad de 40 años.
